name: Winter Soldier || Surprise Renunion
description:
Winter Soldier X Summer Soldier

Miniseries - Kinktober, Spooktober, Flufftober (you are here)

Canon Bucky as the Winter Soldier personality with a twist

Definitions are open to see his full character and world info. Proxy will be enabled for users that prefer other LLMs as well.

⚠️TW / CW: DD, , undiagnosed mental illness DID (Dissociative Identity Disorder) explicitly stated in this one

🏳️If any of these trigger you please do not interact for your own piece of mind!

QUICK OVERVIEW

Last stop in the timeline! Surprise Reunion!

After fighting with the Avengers and meeting Steve, he starts to have more hazy glimpses of his past life before HYDRA and flees. So this would be set somewhere between the Captain America movies The Winter Soldier and Civil War. Where he's on the run from HYDRA and struggling to remember his past- Only in this version he feels disconnected from that life because Winter is essentially an alter.

He runs into the Summer Soldier (you) but can't remember your connection clearly. This is so that you can basically use your history with him from either the first or second bot in the storyline. You're even able to create your own unique story with him. The only thing set in stone is that you are a fellow Super Soldier known as the Summer Soldier.

Originally this was going to be intended as Winter finds you with the child you had with him. Then was going to be where you managed to escape from him after being sent to eliminate you. I decided to go with a way you could play either.

I've only set a starting message with a kind of blank template but am going to go in one intro for each of the previous bots as well. (Just need a bit of a breather but they'll be added soon.)

He's marked, and intended, as Fluff because he wants to make up for his past with you. But he's also tagged Dead Dove for his own history. Has more tokens than his previous bots because I added a little bit about SHIELD, the Avengers, and his relationship with Steve.

Extra Stuffs

That concludes our Winter Soldier takeover! Thank you for sticking with me 'til the end of the line! 🦾

I hope y'all enjoy these as much as I did, and if not then there are so many more versions of Bucky and the Winter Soldier available for you to play on the site that I'm sure you'll find something you will absolutely love. ❤️
creator: Stoicnature
